  • Method Details

    • onCreate

      protected void onCreate(android.os.Bundle savedInstanceState)
      Runs when the activity is started
      Overrides:
      onCreate in class androidx.fragment.app.FragmentActivity
      Parameters:
      savedInstanceState - If the activity is being re-initialized after previously being shut down then this Bundle contains the data it most recently supplied in ComponentActivity.onSaveInstanceState(android.os.Bundle). Note: Otherwise it is null.

    • toggle

      private void toggle(android.view.View view)
      Toggle helper to help views be easier to toggle
      Parameters:
      view - Specific view to be toggled

    • getAllUsersRequest

      private void getAllUsersRequest()
      handler for path GET /admin/users?userId={id}

    • unlockRequest

      private void unlockRequest(long targetId)
      Handler for POST /admin/users{targetId}/unlock
      Parameters:
      targetId - the specific user to unlock

    • activateDeactivateRequest

      private void activateDeactivateRequest(long targetId, boolean activate)
      Handler for PUT /admin/users/{targetId}/activate OR /deactivate
      Parameters:
      targetId - User ID
      activate - T/F for activation deactivation

    • promoteDemoteRequest

      private void promoteDemoteRequest(long targetId, boolean promote)
      handler for PUT /admin/users/{targetId}/promote or /demote
      Parameters:
      targetId - User ID
      promote - T/F for activation deactivation

      private void deleteOtherAccountRequest(long targetId)
      handler for DELETE /admin/users/{targetId}?userId={id}
      Parameters:
      targetId - User Id

    • createNotificationRequest

      private void createNotificationRequest(String title, String message, String type, String scheduledAt)
      Path for POST /notifications
      Parameters:
      title - title of the notification
      message - the notification's message
      type - The type of the notification
      scheduledAt - The date and time the notification is scheduled for.
